ddls:
CREATE TABLE "country_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country entry */,
  "index_entry_number" INTEGER /* Index entry number for the country */,
  "entry_number" INTEGER /* Entry number for the country */,
  "entry_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the entry was created */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Two-letter country code */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the entry (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "entry_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the entry */,
  "last_modified_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_entries_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_entries_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Two-letter country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Common name of the country */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the country's entry (if applicable) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the country's entry (if applicable) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Current population of the country */,
  "area" TEXT /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code for the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., republic, monarchy) */,
  "head_of_state" TEXT /* Name of the head of state */,
  "head_of政府" TEXT /* Name of the head of government */,
  "flag_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the country's flag image */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the country */,
  "time_zones" TEXT /* Time zones in the country (e.g., UTC+2, UTC-5) */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "major_religions" TEXT /* Major religions in the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" TEXT /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "life_expectancy" TEXT /* Average life expectancy in the country */,
  "internet_country_code" TEXT /* Internet country code (e.g., .mm, .mk) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES country_entries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "citizenship_terms" (
  "citizenship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citizenship term */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "citizen_name" TEXT /* Common term for a citizen of the country */,
  "citizen_description" TEXT /* Official description of citizenship */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the citizenship term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the citizenship term */,
  "plural_citizen_name" TEXT /* Plural form of the citizen name */,
  "citizenship_requirements" TEXT /* Brief description of the requirements for obtaining citizenship */,
  "dual_citizenship_allowed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether dual citizenship is allowed */,
  "naturalization_process" TEXT /* Brief description of the naturalization process */,
  "right_of_abode" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the country has a right of abode */,
  "nationality_law" TEXT /* Brief description of the nationality law */,
  "citizenship_by_birth" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether citizenship can be obtained by birth */,
  "citizenship_by_descent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether citizenship can be obtained by descent */,
  "citizenship_by_marriage" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether citizenship can be obtained by marriage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citizenship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizenship_terms_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, editor) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user has staff privileges */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user has superuser privileges */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the entry */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geographic location from which the access was made */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES country_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the entry */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_versions_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES country_entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
